constraints.summary: 2-hour minimum advance booking requirement prevents immediate class start
constraints.impact_if_ignored: System will reject bookings less than 2 hours in advance. Users booking late at night may see no available slots.
constraints.evidence_note: Confirmed in ontology transitions and booking service.
constraints.selected_option: Show earliest available slots, auto-select tomorrow if today empty

constraints.summary: Course must match ticket curriculumType (XG1 guard)
constraints.impact_if_ignored: Mismatched course-ticket combination rejected by LEC-1 precondition. User sees error.
constraints.selected_option: Filter levels by ticket curriculumType before display

constraints.summary: Unlimited ticket allows only 1 concurrent booking
constraints.impact_if_ignored: Returning unlimited users with existing booking cannot book again from completion screen.
constraints.evidence_note: Confirmed in ToS Article 13 and ontology booking guards.
constraints.selected_option: Check existing bookings, show alternative message if one exists

constraints.summary: No purchase completion screen exists — users go directly to Home
constraints.impact_if_ignored: No surface for booking CTA or incentive. Must build new screen.
constraints.evidence_note: Inferred from app navigation flow. No completion screen component found.
constraints.selected_option: Build new purchase completion screen as confirmed in surface
constraints.rationale: Surface confirmed. New screen to be built.

constraints.summary: Taking 1 class forfeits 7-day cooling-off refund right
constraints.impact_if_ignored: Users may not realize booking+attending a class changes refund eligibility.

source_refs.detail: Refund within 7 days requires no 1:1 lesson conducted

constraints.rationale: PO decided during Align: no refund disclosure needed, standard ToS applies.

constraints.summary: BONUS acquisitionType from duplicate-ticket-purchase scope may not be in production
constraints.impact_if_ignored: Bonus ticket cannot be tagged as BONUS type. Fallback: TKT-3 admin API.

source_refs.detail: acquisitionType enum introduced in that scope

constraints.evidence_note: Field in PRD but may not be deployed. Builder to confirm.
constraints.selected_option: Check acquisitionType availability, fallback to TKT-3

constraints.summary: Each level must map to exactly one auto-assigned first lesson (LectureCourse)
constraints.impact_if_ignored: System cannot auto-create a class without a specific LectureCourse. Must define mapping from level to first lesson.

source_refs.detail: createNewPodoLecture requires a specific LectureCourse selection

constraints.evidence_note: Confirmed in ontology action LEC-1 preconditions.
constraints.selected_option: Level-to-first-lesson mapping table using first active LectureCourse

constraints.summary: One-time incentive requires server-side tracking to prevent double-claim on app restart
constraints.impact_if_ignored: User could force-quit and reopen app to claim incentive multiple times. Must track claim status server-side.

source_refs.detail: Incentive awarded on booking confirmation, disappears on exit

constraints.evidence_note: No existing server-side tracking for post-purchase incentives. Must be built.
constraints.selected_option: Server-side incentive eligibility flag on payment record
